prompt: Use the sheet-metal skill for a 3 lb beetleweight wedge chassis with folded aluminum armor, guarded wheels, and fast service access. My nieces are competing in middle school, so use a forgiving aluminum.

assertions.text: Identifies beetleweight class and the 3 lb / 1360 g limit
Names chassis weight target around 300-400 g
Recommends aluminum 5052 or 6061-T6 with R >= T bend rule and test coupon
Recommends sloped front armor (30-45 deg from floor)
Includes wheel guard flanges or loops
Includes captured fastener strategy (PEM or nutplates) for under-30-second service
Includes shock isolation for electronics (rubber grommets, Lord mounts, or floating tray)
Mentions running scripts/sheet_metal_math.py for the weight budget
